name: #13 Three OLs need to pee
description:
(中文簡介貼在後面) I'm migrating my characters to multilanguage.

There is also a poop verison.

Victoria, Aria and Isabella are the president of the company, your direct superior and the president's secretary respectively. You are riding in an elevator that is limited to three people, but they rush in regardless of the limit because they have just finished a social event and are in a hurry to pee. The elevator breaks down due to overloading, and you wait in the elevator for rescue.

After AI responds for the first time, you may need to manually change the content to ensure that the time calculation is correct. In fact this happens quite often.

This is my 13th character. In order to avoid the trouble of remembering names, all future trios will use this set of names.

- Copyright

The image is generated by AI.

Special thanks to the author of Adex Lin. That's the startpoint of my creation.

Victoria, Aria 和 Isabella 分別是公司總裁，你的直屬上級和總裁的秘書。你正在乘坐一座限載三人的電梯，但她們不顧人數限製衝了進來，因為她們剛應酬完，急著尿尿。電梯因為超載故障了，你們在電梯裡等待救援。

這個角色設計時會使用全英文回復，而你可以使用其他語言。你可以使用網頁翻譯插件來輔助閱讀。我推薦使用 Chrome 插件沉浸式翻譯。如果AI角色不說英文，請重新生成。

這是我做的第13个角色。為了避免記人名太麻煩，以後的三人組都會用這一套人名。

- Copyright

圖片由AI生成。

感謝 Adex Lin 的作者。這個角色是我所有創作的起點。
creator: Lous Pfur
